scripts.test:unit: tsc -p tsconfig.test.json && node build/test/exportMocks.test.js && node build/test/engineio.test.js && node build/test/desktopPort.test.js && node build/test/state.test.js && node build/test/util.test.js && node build/test/webp.test.js
scripts.coverage: tsc -p tsconfig.test.json && c8 --all --src build/test --include "build/test/**/*.js" --exclude "build/test/**/*.test.js" --check-coverage --lines 100 --statements 100 --functions 100 --reporter=text --reporter=json-summary --reporter=lcov --reports-dir coverage node --input-type=module -e "await import('./build/test/exportMocks.test.js'); await import('./build/test/engineio.test.js'); await import('./build/test/desktopPort.test.js'); await import('./build/test/state.test.js'); await import('./build/test/util.test.js'); await import('./build/test/webp.test.js')"
